tests.journey: A user with a completed BDD Product Owner analysis downloads a Markdown file and verifies it contains valid Markdown heading syntax.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A completed BDD Product Owner analysis exists
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A .md file is downloaded and its content contains '##'

tests.journey: A user with a completed BDD Product Owner analysis downloads an HTML file and verifies it is a well-formed HTML document with opening and closing html tags.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A completed BDD Product Owner analysis exists
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A .html file is downloaded and its content contains both '<html lang=' and '</html>'

tests.test_name: JSON download contains complete analysis payload
tests.journey: A user with a completed BDD Product Owner analysis downloads a JSON file and verifies it carries the correct shiftdoc framework metadata and at least one test entry.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: JSON download contains complete analysis payload
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A completed BDD Product Owner analysis exists
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A .json file is downloaded, shiftdoc metadata has framework 'bdd', and the JSON contains 1 or more tests

tests.test_name: JSON download contains add-on sections when add-ons were selected
tests.journey: A user who ran a BDD Product Owner analysis with the Gap Analysis add-on downloads a JSON file and verifies the add-on output is present as a top-level key.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: JSON download contains add-on sections when add-ons were selected
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: A completed BDD Product Owner analysis with Gap Analysis add-on exists
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: A .json file is downloaded and the JSON contains a top-level key 'gap_analysis'
